description_long: This is a reusable grocery bag with a rectangular base and tall, straight sides. The lower portion of the bag features a woven, geometric pattern in shades of brown and beige, while the upper section is a solid dark gray or black. Two long, flat handles made of fabric are attached at the top, allowing the bag to be carried by hand or over the shoulder. The bag appears to be made from a non-woven synthetic material, likely polypropylene, which is commonly used for reusable shopping bags. The interior is spacious and unstructured, suitable for carrying groceries or other personal items. The bag is currently empty, as indicated by its flat sides and lack of bulging.
description: A tall, rectangular reusable grocery bag with a brown geometric pattern, dark upper section, and two long black fabric handles. The bag is empty and made from a non-woven synthetic material.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the bag and the two long handles draped together.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full geometric patterned face, dark upper band, and both handles visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the handles visible from a different angle.
description_view_3: Back view, nearly identical to the front, showing the patterned surface and both handles.
